product: Cloud token access for open Delta Sharing sharing (GA)
tagline: Eligible managed and external Delta tables shared using the open Delta Sharing protocol now support directory based access mode.
what_it_does: Eligible managed and external Delta tables shared using the open Delta Sharing protocol now support directory based access mode. Databricks includes the table's cloud storage location and temporary cloud credentials in sharing responses, allowing recipients whose clients support directory based access to read directly from cloud storage without using pre signed URLs. This page explains how to create shares for OpenSharing.
why_it_matters: For Databricks to Databricks shares, the table's Delta log is also shared to improve performance.
key_takeaway: Eligible managed and external Delta tables shared using the open Delta Sharing protocol now support directory based access mode.
